query:
-- Inserir 4 jogos TBD para as Quartas de Final
INSERT INTO games (tournamentId, phase, teamAName, teamBName, matchDate, bettingDeadline, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  (2, 'Quartas de Final', 'A Definir', 'A Definir', '2026-07-03 20:00:00', '2026-07-03 19:00:00', 'scheduled', NOW(), NOW()),
  (2, 'Quartas de Final', 'A Definir', 'A Definir', '2026-07-04 16:00:00', '2026-07-04 15:00:00', 'scheduled', NOW(), NOW()),
  (2, 'Quartas de Final', 'A Definir', 'A Definir', '2026-07-04 20:00:00', '2026-07-04 19:00:00', 'scheduled', NOW(), NOW()),
  (2, 'Quartas de Final', 'A Definir', 'A Definir', '2026-07-05 20:00:00', '2026-07-05 19:00:00', 'scheduled', NOW(), NOW());

-- Verificar estado final
SELECT phase, COUNT(*) as total FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 2 GROUP BY phase ORDER BY FIELD(phase, 'Grupo A','Grupo B','Grupo C','Grupo D','Grupo E','Grupo F','Grupo G','Grupo H','Grupo I','Grupo J','Grupo K','Grupo L','Rodada de 32','Oitavas de Final','Quartas de Final','Semifinais','Disputa 3º Lugar','Final');

  (2, 'Quartas de Final', 'A Definir', 'A Definir', '2026-07-04 16:00:00', '2026-07-04 15:00:00', 'scheduled', NOW(), NOW()),

  (2, 'Quartas de Final', 'A Definir', 'A Definir', '2026-07-05 20:00:00', '2026-07-05 19:00:00', 'scheduled', NOW(), NOW());

-- Verificar estado final
SELECT phase, COUNT(*) as total FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 2 GROUP BY phase ORDER BY FIELD(phase, 'Grupo A','Grupo B','Grupo C','Grupo D','Grupo E','Grupo F','Grupo G','Grupo H','Grupo I','Grupo J','Grupo K','Grupo L','Rodada de 32','Oitavas de Final','Quartas de Final','Semifinais','Disputa 3º Lugar','Final');
